subject: physics
title: 19M.1.SL.TZ2.2
question_html:
What is the unit of electrical potential difference expressed in fundamental SI units?

A. kg m s-1 C-1

B. kg m2 s-2 C-1

C. kg m2 s-3 A-1

D. kg m2 s-1 A
examiners_html: The most popular answer was B giving a low discrimination index for this question. It should be a relatively straightforward question provided the candidate can remember which of ‘C’ or ‘A’ is the fundamental unit.
